meaning: n.芬里厄(斯堪的纳维亚神话中被诸神用魔绳系住的狼形怪物)
examples: Fenrir Greyback is, perhaps, the most savage werewolf alive today.
Harry's stomach turned over. He knew who this was: Fenrir Greyback, the werewolf who was permitted to wear Death Eater robes in return for his hired savagery.
Terrorizing the country with the notoriously savage werewolf Fenrir Greyback (Dave Legeno) and other Death Eaters, she has even left the wizards' beloved Diagon Alley in ruins.
